title: Hook kind: assign-milestone
description: Sets the issue's milestone by title. Resolved at fire-time via `gh api repos/<owner>/<repo>/milestones`; written via `gh issue edit --milestone <title>`. Per DEC-024. Idempotent: a no-op when the issue's milestone already matches.

title.description: The milestone title to assign. Bootstrap validates the milestone exists on the configured repo; fire-time re-validates as a safety net.
